name: Linear Algebra — Eigenvalues
description: Eigenvalue λ: Tv = λv for v ≠ 0. Eigenvector, eigenspace. Characteristic polynomial. Diagonalizable: basis of eigenvectors. Jordan canonical form when not diagonalizable.
mermaid:
graph TD
    D1["Def: Eigenvalue\nTv = λv, v≠0"]
    D2["Def: Eigenvector\nv in E_λ"]
    D3["Def: Char poly\np_T = det of T-xI"]
    D4["Def: Diagonalizable\nbasis of eigenvecs"]
    D5["Def: Jordan form\nblock diagonal"]
    T1["Thm: λ root of p_T"]
    T2["Thm: Diag ⟺\ngeom mult = alg mult"]
    T3["Thm: Jordan exists\nover C"]
    D1 --> D2
    D1 --> D3
    D3 --> T1
    D2 --> D4
    D4 --> T2
    D4 --> D5
    D5 --> T3
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff,stroke:#9775fa
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff,stroke:#40c057
    class D1,D2,D3,D4,D5 definition
    class T1,T2,T3 theorem
